name: Plausible Analytics
description: Easy to use and privacy-friendly Google Analytics alternative
compose:
name: slashnode-plausible
services:
  plausible_db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: plausible-plausible_db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres
    volumes:
      - plausible_db_db-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
  plausible_events_db:
    image: clickhouse/clickhouse-server:24.12-alpine
    container_name: plausible-plausible_events_db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      CLICKHOUSE_SKIP_USER_SETUP: '1'
    volumes:
      - plausible_events_db_event-data:/var/lib/clickhouse
      - plausible_events_db_event-logs:/var/log/clickhouse-server
      - plausible_events_db_clickhouse-clickhouse-config.xml:/etc/clickhouse-server/config.d/logging.xml:ro
      - plausible_events_db_clickhouse-clickhouse-user-config.xml:/etc/clickhouse-server/users.d/logging.xml:ro
  plausible:
    image: ghcr.io/plausible/community-edition:v3.2.1
    container_name: plausible-plausible
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: sh -c "sleep 10 && /entrypoint.sh db createdb && /entrypoint.sh db migrate && /entrypoint.sh run"
    depends_on:
      - plausible_db
      - plausible_events_db
    environment:
      BASE_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:9093
      SECRET_KEY_BASE: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      TOTP_VAULT_KEY: ${secret.APP_PLAUSIBLE_VAULT_KEY}
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:9093:8000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  plausible_db_db-data:
    name: slashnode-plausible_plausible_db_db-data
  plausible_events_db_event-data:
    name: slashnode-plausible_plausible_events_db_event-data
  plausible_events_db_event-logs:
    name: slashnode-plausible_plausible_events_db_event-logs
  plausible_events_db_clickhouse-clickhouse-config.xml:
    name: slashnode-plausible_plausible_events_db_clickhouse-clickhouse-config.xml
  plausible_events_db_clickhouse-clickhouse-user-config.xml:
    name: slashnode-plausible_plausible_events_db_clickhouse-clickhouse-user-config.xml
